scripts.native:sync: npm run build && cap sync && node scripts/register-forwarddraft-plugin.mjs
scripts.native:build:ios: npm run native:sync && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.native:build:mac: npm run native:sync && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -destination 'platform=macOS,variant=Designed for iPad' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.native:ios: npm run native:sync && cap open ios
